intro.location: Attualmente a Thanjavur, India — aperto al remote e alla ricollocazione
intro.name: Arockia Bilgates
intro.title: Sviluppatore Full Stack specializzato in MERN e applicazioni AI.
intro.description: Creo applicazioni web scalabili e production-grade con React, Next.js, Node.js, Express e MongoDB — con l'integrazione dell'AI al centro. Oltre 3 anni di esperienza nella consegna di REST API, sistemi in tempo reale e prodotti Gemini AI.

about.heading: Chi sono
about.paragraph1: Sono Arockia Bilgates, un Ingegnere Software Full Stack con sede a Thanjavur, India, con oltre 3 anni di esperienza nella creazione e nel deployment di applicazioni web scalabili con MERN e integrazione AI.
about.paragraph2: Mi specializzo in soluzioni end-to-end — da frontend ad alte prestazioni con React.js e Next.js a sistemi backend robusti con Node.js, Express.js, Spring Boot e Django.
about.paragraph3: Ciò che mi distingue è l'integrazione dell'AI. Ho creato applicazioni di produzione con Gemini AI per la ricerca intelligente, il mentoring del codice, i motori di confronto dei prodotti e i chatbot conversazionali.
about.paragraph4: Ho solide basi in DSA, progettazione di sistemi e sviluppo backend, inclusi JWT, Google OAuth, RBAC, Docker, CI/CD e deployment su AWS, Vercel e Render.
about.paragraph5: Oltre allo sviluppo, conduco programmi strutturati di MERN e DSA — il che mi permette di comunicare sistemi complessi con chiarezza.
about.paragraph6: Sto cercando attivamente ruoli di ingegneria full stack per costruire prodotti intelligenti e scalabili in un team ad alte prestazioni.

services.heading: I miei Servizi
services.content: Servizi di sviluppo end-to-end, dal frontend al full stack.

experience.heading: La mia Esperienza
experience.content: Esperienza professionale nello sviluppo full stack, integrazione AI e ruoli ingegneristici.

freelance_current.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
freelance_current.description: Architecting and delivering production-grade MERN + AI client projects integrating Gemini AI APIs, Socket.io real-time features, and Razorpay payment gateways end-to-end. Building reusable REST API structures with JWT authentication, RBAC, and Docker-based deployment, reducing project setup time by 40%. Designing and delivering cohort-based MERN and DSA programs, achieving 90%+ course completion rates.

amypo.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
amypo.description: Developed and deployed production-grade MERN applications using React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB with JWT authentication, RBAC security, and role-based dashboards. Architected scalable RESTful APIs following controller-service-repository layered patterns, reducing average API latency by 30%. Implemented Docker-based CI/CD pipelines, reducing environment failures by 60% across 20+ engineering deployments.

prag.title: Python Developer & Associate Robotic Engineer
prag.description: Engineered Python and OpenCV automation pipelines reducing image processing time by 30% and improving ML-driven sensor accuracy from 85% to 94% via Flask REST services. Containerised microservices using Docker, cutting environment setup time by 50%. Refactored legacy automation scripts into modular service components, reducing code redundancy by 35%.

cadd.title: Application Developer
cadd.description: Built Java and Python backend applications using OOP and MVC principles, shipped with Git version control and Postman API testing, accelerating delivery cycles by 40%. Designed modular, reusable code structures for backend logic and API integration across multiple client-facing application builds.

freelance_early.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
freelance_early.description: Delivered 10+ full-stack web applications for clients using React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB with end-to-end ownership from requirements to production deployment. Developed REST APIs with JWT authentication, integrated third-party services, and built responsive mobile-first React frontends independently.

projects.heading: I miei Progetti
projects.content: Applicazioni MERN di produzione integrate con AI — costruite, deployate e consegnate.

prepgenius.title: PrepGenius — AI Coding Interview Platform
prepgenius.description: A full-stack MERN coding platform with Monaco Editor and Judge0 automated judging for 20 DSA problems. Gemini AI post-submission mentor streams time/space complexity analysis and interview coaching via Server-Sent Events. Features 3-level progressive hint system, real-time AI chat assistant, and personalised weekly skill roadmap.

arocart.title: AroCart AI — AI-Powered E-Commerce Platform
arocart.description: AI-powered e-commerce with Gemini smart search (intent detection), AI shopping assistant, and AI product comparison engine. Integrates Razorpay (UPI/Cards/COD) with HMAC SHA256 payment verification, Google OAuth, and 6-stage live order tracking across 64 products in 6 categories.

quickhelp.title: QuickHelp — Real-Time Micro-Task Marketplace
quickhelp.description: Two-sided MERN marketplace with Socket.io real-time bid notifications, live status updates, and helper online/offline tracking. Full task lifecycle — post, bid, accept, complete, confirm — with dispute resolution, RBAC-secured role-based dashboards, and admin moderation panel.

queuely.title: Queuely — AI Appointment & Queue Management
queuely.description: Smart appointment booking with live queue tracking showing real-time position and estimated wait time. AI scheduling assistant for optimal slot suggestions. Implements multi-service booking, staff management dashboard, and real-time queue updates via Socket.io.

arocareer.title: AroCareer — AI-Powered Job Portal
arocareer.description: Job portal with AI resume analyser scoring resumes against job descriptions. Features AI cover letter generator, job-match scoring system, and personalised interview preparation powered by Gemini AI — giving candidates a complete AI-assisted job search experience.

arobot.title: AroBot — AI Conversational Chatbot
arobot.description: ChatGPT-style chat application with streaming AI responses, persistent conversation history, and markdown rendering. Integrates Gemini and Groq APIs with intelligent fallback handling. Polished dark-themed responsive UI optimised for fast, natural AI conversations.

grocery.title: GrocerGo — App Full Stack per la Consegna di Generi Alimentari
grocery.description: Piattaforma di consegna alimentare pronta per la produzione con sito di shopping, pannello di amministrazione e dashboard dei corrieri con condivisione della posizione in tempo reale. Include RBAC per ruoli Admin, Utente e Corriere, tracciamento degli ordini in tempo reale, e-mail automatizzate e assegnazione automatica dei corrieri tramite job in background Inngest.

netflix.title: Netflix Clone — Piattaforma di Streaming Full Stack
netflix.description: Piattaforma di streaming full stack ispirata a Netflix con autenticazione utente, navigazione di film e serie, filtro per genere e watchlist personalizzata. UI responsive con animazioni fluide e integrazione API TMDB.

admin.title: Dashboard Admin React
admin.description: Dashboard amministrativo completo con analisi in tempo reale, visualizzazioni dati interattive e pannelli CRUD per utenti, prodotti e ordini. Include modalità scura/chiara, layout responsive e controllo accessi basato sui ruoli.
